Result: {"topic": "api_usage", "content": "Nexus Corp API Guide (Updated April 19, 2026)

DEAL ENDPOINTS (v2 — v1 deprecated):
  POST /v2/deals/update — Update deal stage
    Required: deal_id, stage, notes
    Optional: discount_pct, approval_ref, compliance_id

  POST /v2/compliance/generate — Generate compliance ID
    Required: deal_id
    Returns: compliance_id (string)

TICKET ENDPOINTS (v1 — unchanged):
  POST /v1/tickets/resolve — Resolve ticket
    Required: ticket_id, resolution, resolution_type
    Valid resolution_types: technical_fix, workaround, escalation, refund

REPORT ENDPOINTS (v1 — unchanged):
  POST /v1/reports/submit — Submit report
    Required: report_type, data
    Valid report_types: deal_closure, incident, compliance, audit_summary

NOTE: All v1 deal endpoints were deprecated on April 19. Use v2.", "source": "documentation", "note": "Documentation is up to date."}

Result: {"topic": "deal_approval", "policy": "Deals valued over $50,000 require VP approval before closing. Agents may offer discounts up to 10% without manager approval. Discounts between 10-20% require manager sign-off. Discounts over 20% require VP approval.", "version": "v1", "source": "policy_system", "note": "Policies are periodically updated. Check back if something seems inconsistent."}
{"tool_name": "ask_manager", "arguments": {"question": "How should I handle deal closure and any tickets?"}}

Result: {"source": "manager", "response": "For DEAL-001 at $75k, you'll need VP approval. Make sure you have a compliance ID before closing \u2014 it's a new requirement as of last week. Use /v2/deals/update with the compliance_id field.", "caveat": "Manager is busy and may not have the latest information. Verify critical details."}
